text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: No paper with the exact title "Prophet inequalities and posted pricing mechanisms" by Correa, Korol, and Hoeksma exists in any academic database or web search results. The real related papers by Correa and Hoeksma have different titles (e.g., "Posted Price Mechanisms and Optimal Threshold Strategies for Random Arrivals" in Mathematics of Operations Research, 2021) and different co-authors (Foncea, Oosterwijk, Vredeveld — not "Anja Korol"). The cited author list does not match any known paper in this area.
LINK: NONE
